raw_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE priority IN ('1 - Critical', '2 - High')) AS high_priority_count
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE '%hardware%'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at), category
ORDER BY month, category;
template:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE priority IN (?s, ?s)) AS high_priority_count
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE ?s
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at), category
ORDER BY month, category;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    short_description,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE priority IN ('1 - Critical', '2 - High')) AS high_priority_count,
    MIN(opened_at) AS first_seen,
    MAX(opened_at) AS last_seen
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE '%hardware%'
  AND opened_at >= '2023-07-01' AND opened_at < '2023-09-01'
GROUP BY short_description
ORDER BY incident_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
template:
SELECT 
    short_description,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE priority IN (?s, ?s)) AS high_priority_count,
    MIN(opened_at) AS first_seen,
    MAX(opened_at) AS last_seen
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE ?s
  AND opened_at >= ?s AND opened_at < ?s
GROUP BY short_description
ORDER BY incident_count DESC
LIMIT ?n;

predicates: ((category ~~* '%hardware%'::text) AND (opened_at >= '2023-07-01 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone) AND (opened_at < '2023-09-01 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN short_description ILIKE '%printer%' THEN 'Printer'
        WHEN short_description ILIKE '%monitor%' OR short_description ILIKE '%screen%' OR short_description ILIKE '%display%' THEN 'Monitor/Display'
        WHEN short_description ILIKE '%keyboard%' THEN 'Keyboard'
        WHEN short_description ILIKE '%mouse%' THEN 'Mouse'
        WHEN short_description ILIKE '%server%' THEN 'Server'
        WHEN short_description ILIKE '%network%' OR short_description ILIKE '%cable%' OR short_description ILIKE '%router%' THEN 'Network Hardware'
        WHEN short_description ILIKE '%laptop%' OR short_description ILIKE '%computer%' OR short_description ILIKE '%desktop%' THEN 'Computer/Laptop'
        ELSE 'Other'
    END AS hardware_type,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE priority = '1 - Critical') AS critical_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE priority = '2 - High') AS high_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN ('Open', 'In Progress', 'New')) AS unresolved_count
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE '%hardware%'
  AND opened_at >= '2023-07-01' AND opened_at < '2023-09-01'
GROUP BY hardware_type
ORDER BY incident_count DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS hardware_type,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE priority = ?s) AS critical_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE priority = ?s) AS high_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN (?s, ?s, ?s)) AS unresolved_count
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE ?s
  AND opened_at >= ?s AND opened_at < ?s
GROUP BY hardware_type
ORDER BY incident_count DESC;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (short_description ~~* '%printer%'::text) THEN 'Printer'::text WHEN ((short_description ~~* '%monitor%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%screen%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%display%'::text)) THEN 'Monitor/Display'::text WHEN (short_description ~~* '%keyboard%'::text) THEN 'Keyboard'::text WHEN (short_description ~~* '%mouse%'::text) THEN 'Mouse'::text WHEN (short_description ~~* '%server%'::text) THEN 'Server'::text WHEN ((short_description ~~* '%network%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%cable%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%router%'::text)) THEN 'Network Hardware'::text WHEN ((short_description ~~* '%laptop%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%computer%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%desktop%'::text)) THEN 'Computer/Laptop'::text ELSE 'Other'::text END

predicates: ((category ~~* '%hardware%'::text) AND (opened_at >= '2023-07-01 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone) AND (opened_at < '2023-09-01 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('week', opened_at) AS week_start,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE '%printer%') AS printer_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE '%monitor%' OR short_description ILIKE '%screen%' OR short_description ILIKE '%display%') AS monitor_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE '%keyboard%') AS keyboard_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE '%server%') AS server_count,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE '%hardware%'
  AND opened_at >= '2023-07-01' AND opened_at < '2023-09-01'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', opened_at)
ORDER BY week_start;
template:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS week_start,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE ?s) AS printer_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s) AS monitor_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE ?s) AS keyboard_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE ?s) AS server_count,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE ?s
  AND opened_at >= ?s AND opened_at < ?s
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
ORDER BY week_start;

predicates: ((category ~~* '%hardware%'::text) AND (opened_at >= '2023-07-01 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone) AND (opened_at < '2023-09-01 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    assignment_group,
    COUNT(*) AS total_incidents,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE '%printer%') AS printer_incidents,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE priority IN ('1 - Critical', '2 - High')) AS high_priority_count,
    MIN(opened_at) AS first_incident,
    MAX(opened_at) AS last_incident
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE '%hardware%'
  AND opened_at >= '2023-07-17' AND opened_at < '2023-08-21'
GROUP BY assignment_group
ORDER BY total_incidents DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600), 1) AS avg_resolution_hours,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE priority = '1 - Critical') AS critical_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE priority = '2 - High') AS high_count
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE '%hardware%'
  AND opened_at >= '2023-07-17' AND opened_at < '2023-08-21'
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY incident_count DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n), ?n) AS avg_resolution_hours,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE priority = ?s) AS critical_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE priority = ?s) AS high_count
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE ?s
  AND opened_at >= ?s AND opened_at < ?s
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY incident_count DESC;

predicates: ((category ~~* '%hardware%'::text) AND (opened_at >= '2023-07-17 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone) AND (opened_at < '2023-08-21 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN opened_at >= '2023-07-17' AND opened_at < '2023-08-21' THEN 'Spike Period'
        ELSE 'Baseline'
    END AS period,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600), 1) AS avg_resolution_hours,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 1) AS median_resolution_hours,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE priority IN ('1 - Critical', '2 - High')) AS high_priority_count
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE '%hardware%'
  AND closed_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY period
ORDER BY period;
template:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN opened_at >= ?s AND opened_at < ?s THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS period,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n), ?n) AS avg_resolution_hours,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(?n) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS median_resolution_hours,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE priority IN (?s, ?s)) AS high_priority_count
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE ?s
  AND closed_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY period
ORDER BY period;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((opened_at >= '2023-07-17 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone) AND (opened_at < '2023-08-21 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone)) THEN 'Spike Period'::text ELSE 'Baseline'::text END)

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    caller_id,
    COUNT(*) AS incidents_filed,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE '%printer%') AS printer_incidents,
    MIN(opened_at) AS first_report,
    MAX(opened_at) AS last_report
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE '%hardware%'
  AND opened_at >= '2023-07-17' AND opened_at < '2023-08-21'
GROUP BY caller_id
ORDER BY incidents_filed DESC
LIMIT 20;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    caller_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE opened_at >= '2023-07-17' AND opened_at < '2023-08-21') AS spike_period_incidents,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE opened_at < '2023-07-17' OR opened_at >= '2023-08-21') AS baseline_incidents
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE '%hardware%'
GROUP BY caller_id
ORDER BY spike_period_incidents DESC NULLS LAST;
template:
SELECT 
    caller_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE opened_at >= ?s AND opened_at < ?s) AS spike_period_incidents,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE opened_at < ?s OR opened_at >= ?s) AS baseline_incidents
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE ?s
GROUP BY caller_id
ORDER BY spike_period_incidents DESC NULLS LAST;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    opened_at::date AS incident_date,
    COUNT(*) AS daily_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE '%printer%') AS printer_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE '%monitor%' OR short_description ILIKE '%screen%' OR short_description ILIKE '%display%') AS monitor_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE '%server%') AS server_count
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE '%hardware%'
  AND opened_at >= '2023-07-10' AND opened_at < '2023-08-21'
GROUP BY opened_at::date
ORDER BY incident_date;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    opened_at::date AS incident_date,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE '%printer%') AS printer_incidents,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description NOT ILIKE '%printer%') AS other_hardware,
    COUNT(*) AS total_hardware
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE '%hardware%'
  AND opened_at >= '2023-07-18' AND opened_at < '2023-08-25'
GROUP BY opened_at::date
ORDER BY incident_date;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN opened_at < '2023-08-06' THEN 'Before print server resolved (Jul 18 - Aug 5)'
        ELSE 'After print server resolved (Aug 6+)'
    END AS period,
    COUNT(*) AS total_hardware_incidents,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE '%printer%') AS printer_incidents,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE '%printer%') * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS printer_pct,
    MIN(opened_at)::date AS period_start,
    MAX(opened_at)::date AS period_end
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE '%hardware%'
  AND opened_at >= '2023-07-18' AND opened_at < '2023-09-01'
GROUP BY period
ORDER BY period_start;
template:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN opened_at < ?s THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS period,
    COUNT(*) AS total_hardware_incidents,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE ?s) AS printer_incidents,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE short_description ILIKE ?s) * ?n / COUNT(*), ?n) AS printer_pct,
    MIN(opened_at)::date AS period_start,
    MAX(opened_at)::date AS period_end
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE ?s
  AND opened_at >= ?s AND opened_at < ?s
GROUP BY period
ORDER BY period_start;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (opened_at < '2023-08-06 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone) THEN 'Before print server resolved (Jul 18 - Aug 5)'::text ELSE 'After print server resolved (Aug 6+)'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    opened_at,
    closed_at,
    short_description,
    priority,
    state,
    caller_id,
    assigned_to,
    ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600, 1) AS resolution_hours

  AND (opened_at::date = '2023-08-17' OR closed_at::date BETWEEN '2023-08-15' AND '2023-08-20')

template:
SELECT 
    opened_at,
    closed_at,
    short_description,
    priority,
    state,
    caller_id,
    assigned_to,
    ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n, ?n) AS resolution_hours
FROM flag_9
WHERE category ILIKE ?s
  AND (opened_at::date = ?s OR closed_at::date BETWEEN ?s AND ?s)
ORDER BY opened_at;
